title: Entropy conservation in biological oscillatory systems
note: Three independent groups converged on the same 6-octave recursive hierarchy. Sam's 6 in 6π⁵ = Walter's 3 planes × 2 sheets. The CV of 0.018 shouldn't be that low by accident.

AI can only learn from where it encounters unpredictable outcomes. Creator freedom IS the bottleneck, not AI capability. Maximum entropy surface = maximum learning. This is why 'nothing to lose' is a structural advantage, not a personality trait.

title: ARC-AGI-3 Benchmark Progress
note: 96/127 levels banked (75.6%). The remaining games need different strategies — not more compute, different thinking.
